member.name: M:SafeShift.Controllers.AuthController.Register(SafeShift.Models.DTOs.Auth.RegisterUserDto)
member.remarks: The email must be unique. Passwords are hashed before being stored.

member.name: M:SafeShift.Controllers.AuthController.Login(SafeShift.Models.DTOs.Auth.LoginDto)
member.remarks: Login succeeds only when the supplied email and password match a stored user.

member.name: M:SafeShift.Controllers.IncidentsController.GetAllIncidents(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Returns incidents with optional severity, user, and date filters.

member.name: M:SafeShift.Controllers.IncidentsController.GetIncidentById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a single incident by identifier.

member.name: M:SafeShift.Controllers.InspectionsController.GetAllInspections(System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Returns inspections with an optional date filter.

member.name: M:SafeShift.Controllers.InspectionsController.GetInspectionById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a single inspection by identifier.

member.name: M:SafeShift.Controllers.ShiftsController.GetAllShifts(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Returns shifts with optional user and date filters.

member.name: M:SafeShift.Controllers.ShiftsController.GetShiftById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a single shift by identifier.

member.name: M:SafeShift.Controllers.UsersController.GetUserById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a single user by identifier.
